fact_order_items._description: Main fact table containing all orders and order items. Use this for revenue, order counts, freight, and delivery analysis. Do NOT use fact_orders — it does not exist. Do NOT prefix column names with the table name when specifying time_filter column.
fact_order_items.price: Sale price of the product in this order item (revenue)
fact_order_items.freight_value: Shipping/freight cost charged for this order item
fact_order_items.order_purchase_timestamp: When the order was placed. For time_filter use column: 'order_purchase_timestamp' exactly.
fact_order_items.order_delivered_customer_date: When the order was actually delivered to the customer
fact_order_items.order_estimated_delivery_date: The estimated delivery date promised to the customer
fact_order_items.order_id: Unique identifier for each order (UUID type — cannot be used with SUM or AVG)

dim_customers._description: Customer dimension table. Join to fact_order_items on customer_id to get geographic data. Always include join: 'fact_order_items.customer_id = dim_customers.customer_id' when using any dim_customers column.
dim_customers.customer_state: Brazilian state abbreviation (e.g. SP, RJ, MG)
dim_customers.customer_city: City where the customer is located

dim_products._description: Product dimension table. Join to fact_order_items on product_id to get category data. Always include join: 'fact_order_items.product_id = dim_products.product_id' when using any dim_products column.
dim_products.product_category_name: Product category in Portuguese (e.g. Automotivo, Bebes, Eletronicos)

dim_date._description: Date dimension table. Contains year, month, week, day breakdowns for time-based analysis.
